items.name: Laser Finger Pointers
items.description: The second you equip these, lasers will begin to shoot from your fingers. The color of the laser is up to you. Each click will cycle between a red (does damage), green (heals players), or blue laser (pushes and trips other players). Just be careful--once this is equipped, the lasers will fire! Looks great in places with dynamic lighting!
